name: Lamb Vindaloo
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut lamb into cubes measuring 3/4 inch.
2. Combine lamb, bones, and all ingredients in a non-metallic bowl. Marinate at room temperature for 8 hours or refrigerate for 24 hours.
3. Blend onion, garlic, and ginger with 2 tablespoons oil until smooth.
4. Heat oil in a large enamel skillet over medium-high heat. Sauté onions until caramelized, stirring constantly to avoid burning.
5. Add puree, then spices (cumin, mustard seeds, turmeric, red pepper flakes, paprika). When spices sizzle and darken slightly, add lamb and bones. Cook until lightly browned, about 10 minutes.
6. Pour in water and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer partially covered until meat is tender, approximately 30 minutes.
7. Remove and discard bones before serving over rice.
